final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing sci-fi space scene featuring an astronaut floating in Earth orbit.

Style/medium: needs a "科幻" space aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2001: A Space Odyssey cinematic grandeur, NASA Apollo photography heritage, 1970s sci-fi book cover illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include space station structures at the image edges, astronaut as central focal subject
Subject: must include an astronaut in detailed spacesuit
Scene/backdrop: must include Earth orbit context, the Milky Way and nebulae in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a majestic, awe-inspiring atmosphere with Earth-reflected light — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cosmic direction with starlight and nebula hues — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs detailed spacesuit surface treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
